Nav.auditLogTitle: Tier 2 — multi-tenancy (audit log requires multi-workspace boundary)

Dashboard.statCostDisabled: Cost tracking is not enabled yet
Dashboard.recentQueriesEmpty: No queries recorded yet — query logging is not enabled.

KbList.title: Knowledge bases
KbList.subtitlePrefix: Each KB is provisioned with its own Azure AI Search index (
KbList.emptyDesc: Create your first KB to start ingesting documents.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.footerAlert: Alert rules in Dashboard → System health

Users.adminRequiredDesc: Managing workspace members, roles, and per-KB access needs the Workspace Admin role.
Users.subtitle: Workspace members · role assignment · per-KB access. Roles are mapped via Entra ID groups; assignments here update both Postgres <mono>users</mono> table and Entra group membership.
Users.errorMembersDesc: The <mono>/users</mono> request failed. Reload the page to retry.
Users.emptyMembers: No members match the current filter.
Users.inviteDesc: Pre-authorise an email + workspace role. An invite record is created (status = invited) and a verification email is sent.
Users.inviteNamePlaceholder: Optional — derived from email if left blank
Users.inviteRoleHint: Power User is a Tier 2 role — not assignable in Tier 1.
Users.suspendDesc: {name} ({email}) will lose access to all KBs and can no longer sign in. Re-invite to restore access.
Users.errorRolesDesc: A roles / permissions request failed. Reload the page to retry.
Users.rbacBannerDesc: Tier 1: Admin / Editor / End User — view-gating enforced server-side per audit log. Tier 2: Power User adds advanced retrieval tuning. Permissions are not editable per ADR-0024 (predefined roles); custom roles are Tier 2.
Users.permMatrixDesc: What each role can do · ✓ = allowed · — = denied
Users.errorGroupsDesc: The <mono>/groups</mono> request failed. Reload the page to retry.
Users.entraGroupsDesc: Synced from <mono>{domain}</mono> tenant · group → role mapping in Settings → Identity & Auth
Users.emptyGroups: No Entra ID groups synced yet.
Users.errorAuditDesc: The <mono>/admin/audit-log</mono> request failed. Reload the page to retry.
Users.auditDesc: Every role / access / config change is logged with actor + target + timestamp · 90d retention

Login.subtitle: Sign in with your Ricoh corporate account or with email.
Login.toastInvalidCredsDesc: Check your credentials and try again.
Login.toastEmailNotVerifiedDesc: Check your inbox or resend the code.

AuthFrame.headline: Knowledge retrieval, grounded in your real documents.
AuthFrame.subtitle: Hybrid retrieval · Cohere v4.0-pro rerank · CRAG self-correction · 9-stage trace · Image-grounded citations.
AuthFrame.metricSubCorpus: Drive Manuals · D365 F&O ERP corpus

Register.step1Subtitle: Self-register with email · SSO via <signin>Sign in</signin> if you have Entra ID.
Register.emailHint: We'll send a 6-digit verification code · Beta cohort restricted to <mono>@ricoh.com</mono>
Register.passwordHint: Scrypt-hashed via ADR-0022 · ≥ 12 chars, ≥ 1 number, ≥ 1 symbol
Register.terms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> · I understand my queries are logged for evaluation (Langfuse) and visible only to me.
Register.step2Subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to activate your account.
Register.nextStep2: You'll be auto-signed in and routed to <mono>/dashboard</mono>
Register.accountReady: Your account is ready. Head to your dashboard to get started.
Register.multiKbTitle: Multi-KB selector — Tier 1 ships with a single shared KB per Q7 default
Register.multiKbHint: Multi-KB selection arrives later — Tier 1 ships with a single shared KB.
Register.errAcceptTerms: Accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to continue.
Register.toastVerifSent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
Register.errEmailExists: An account with that email already exists.
Register.errEmailExistsDesc: Sign in instead, or use a different email.
Register.errVerifExpiredDesc: Request a new code via Resend.
Register.errResendLimitDesc: Wait a bit before trying again.

Chat.privacyNotice: Server-side per ADR-0031 · scoped to user · Postgres backing
Chat.emptyDesc: AR / AP / FA / CB / GL / BM · D365 F&O ERP corpus · Cohere v4.0-pro rerank · Image-grounded citations.
Chat.withScreenshotCount: {count, plural, one {# with screenshot} other {# with screenshots}}
Chat.sourcesMeta: · {chunks} chunks across {docs, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}}
Chat.panelMeta: {chunks, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}} · {images} with screenshot · sorted by relevance
Chat.feedbackMeta: {citations, plural, one {# citation} other {# citations}} · {images} with screenshot
Chat.commentUp: Glad it helped! Tell us more (optional)
Chat.commentDown: Sorry about that. What went wrong? (optional)
Chat.commentPlaceholderDown: Missing info, wrong answer, refused incorrectly…
Chat.composerPlaceholder: Ask about Ricoh financial software… (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline)
Chat.composerFooter: Hybrid retrieval · Cohere v4.0-pro rerank · GPT-5.5 synthesis · CRAG L2 self-correction

Settings.subtitle: Profile · theme · all external service connections · Entra ID + MSAL config · API quotas. Zero hardcoded credentials — every endpoint, secret, and connection string is managed here and persisted in Azure Key Vault.
Settings.sessionEntra: Entra ID SSO · MSAL session active
Settings.editProfileReason: Wave C2 — profile edit requires Entra Graph SDK + RBAC
Settings.themeDesc: Warm Charcoal (light) / Warm Neutral Dark (dark) · 100% oklch tokens
Settings.densityDesc: Compact / Comfortable layout density — Wave C2 promote
Settings.densityReason: Wave C2 — density toggle requires layout token system
Settings.languageDesc: JP / ZH support is Tier 2 — disabled per ADR-0024
Settings.languageReason: Wave D+ — multi-language support (JP / ZH) is Tier 2 scope
Settings.rotateReason: Wave C+ — session rotation requires re-MSAL flow + token refresh
Settings.deleteReason: Wave D+ — account deletion is Tier 2 (requires RBAC + audit hooks)

SettingsApiKeys.loadFailed: Failed to load API Keys tab:
SettingsApiKeys.outgoingDesc: Real-time TPM / RPM utilization · alerts fire at the configured threshold % per row
SettingsApiKeys.incomingDesc: Issued to external applications that call EKP /query · per-key scoped to KB(s) + rate limit

SettingsTabError.title: The {tabName} tab hit an error
SettingsTabError.desc: Something went wrong rendering this tab. Retry, or reload the page if it persists.

SettingsAudit.title: Audit log
SettingsAudit.desc: Configuration changes from Connections / Identity / API Keys PATCH endpoints. Filter by action or date; older pages load on demand.
SettingsAudit.emptyFiltered: No audit entries match the current filter.
SettingsAudit.empty: No audit entries yet. Mutating Settings (Connections / Identity / API Keys) PATCH endpoints will populate this log.

SettingsIdentity.bannerDesc: Hybrid auth per ADR-0014: Entra ID SSO + self-register fallback. Transport: httpOnly cookie + CSRF double-submit + /auth/refresh rotation per ADR-0022. Changes are audit-logged.
SettingsIdentity.secretRotateDisabledReason: Wave C2 — rotation requires Entra Graph SDK
SettingsIdentity.roleMappingDesc: Map Entra security groups → EKP roles · Tier 1 has 3 active roles · Power User is Tier 2 (ADR-0027 fallback) · editing roles is Wave C+
SettingsIdentity.allowedDomainsHint: Self-register requires matching email domain · email verification mandatory
SettingsIdentity.mfaAdminAria: Require MFA for Workspace Admin role
SettingsIdentity.mfaAdminLabel: Require MFA for Workspace Admin role
SettingsIdentity.mfaAllReason: Wave D+ — full-tenant MFA enforcement is Tier 2 scope

SettingsConnections.bannerDesc: Every endpoint, secret, and connection string is managed here (persisted in Azure Key Vault when configured; `.env` fallback in dev). Secret values are never shown — only masked previews.
SettingsConnections.notRotatedHint: Not rotated yet — click the refresh icon to mint a new value in Key Vault.
SettingsConnections.spBanner: Configure the Entra app used to import from SharePoint. IT must also grant the app Sites.Selected (read) on each target site — that per-site grant stays an IT action. Unset fields fall back to .env.
SettingsConnections.spPlaceholderReplace: Enter a new secret to replace…
SettingsConnections.spSecretHint: Written straight to Key Vault — never shown, logged, or committed (H5).

SettingsDocProfiling.bannerText: Document classification rules — the system uses a rule-based profiler (W72) at ingest to detect the document profile and automatically apply the matching recall preset.
SettingsDocProfiling.bannerDesc: Command center for automatic rules: tune the profile→preset mapping + detection threshold · ADR-0056 layer A · LLM fallback safeguard
SettingsDocProfiling.mappingDesc: Which recall/render preset each detected profile applies. Changes here affect all newly ingested documents (existing documents need re-index).
SettingsDocProfiling.thresholdDesc: Tune the profiler classification thresholds. Below the confidence threshold → fallback to a conservative preset + flag as "pending manual review".
SettingsDocProfiling.th1Hint: Below this → yellow flag + fallback conservative preset
SettingsDocProfiling.th2Hint: ≥ this + depth≥3 + list_ratio≥0.3 → P1 Image-dense SOP
SettingsDocProfiling.th3Hint: Fewer paragraphs than this → too_small (not routed, inherits parent)
SettingsDocProfiling.thresholdFooter: Changing thresholds only affects future ingest · ADR-0056 D2 rule v3
SettingsDocProfiling.saveRuleDisabledTitle: Threshold write stays disabled (W79 / ADR-0058: five rounds of evidence already optimal)
SettingsDocProfiling.dialogDesc: Adjust the recall preset this profile applies automatically ·
SettingsDocProfiling.editWarning: This mapping applies to all newly ingested "{label}" documents. Existing documents need re-index to take effect; the defaults are already well-proven — please confirm before changing.
SettingsDocProfiling.neighbourHint: On = same-section neighbour aux images enter candidates; number = aux image cap.
SettingsDocProfiling.sectionAnchorHint: On = aux images anchor into their own sections (end pile → within section); nearest = anchor to the nearest step by doc_order (otherwise section end); number = per-anchor cap (0 = no cap).

KbNew.subtitle: A KB is an isolated multimodal retrieval namespace — text chunks + embedded images, with cross-doc SHA256 dedup. Queries return text answers with relevant screenshots inline. We'll provision an Azure AI Search index ekp-kb-{indexId}-v1 plus a Blob container for the images.
KbNew.nameHint: Display name shown to users · editable after creation
KbNew.descPlaceholder: What this KB contains and who uses it…
KbNew.descHint: Helps members understand scope · editable after creation
KbNew.kbIdHint: Locked after creation. Forms the Azure AI Search index name ekp-kb-{indexId}-v1 and Blob container. Must be lowercase, hyphen/underscore only · max 40 chars.
KbNew.kbIdError: Only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores.
KbNew.chunkerLayoutHint: Docling · preserves headings, tables, lists, image positions
KbNew.chunkerSlideHint: python-pptx · one chunk per slide (recommended for .pptx-heavy KBs)
KbNew.configWarnBanner: These choices affect the index schema and embedding vectors. Changing them later requires a full re-index (re-parse + re-embed every document into a new v{nPlus1} index).
KbNew.dimensionHint: MRL truncate · 1024d is W2 baseline (best recall/cost ratio per Q19)
KbNew.pipelineCaptionNote: Vision model fills alt_text when source has none
KbNew.heroTitle: How text + image retrieval works in this KB
KbNew.heroDesc: For .docx / .pdf / .pptx that contain both text and images (e.g. user manuals, training decks), images are extracted alongside text and bound to their parent text chunk via embedded_image_positions: ["img@{docOrder}"]. At query time, citations carry both the text excerpt and the associated screenshot.
KbNew.t2Legend: = Tier 2 preview, not yet implemented in the current Beta. Other steps are active today.
KbNew.optEmbeddedDesc: Docling extracts inline PNG/JPG from .docx + .pdf; python-pptx pulls picture shapes from .pptx. Uses source-provided alt_text when present.
KbNew.optSlideDesc: When a slide is image-heavy or layout-critical, capture the rendered slide as a single screenshot bound to that slide's chunk.
KbNew.optPdfDesc: For PDFs where layout is critical (forms, diagrams), capture each page as a screenshot. Increases Blob storage ~10× per doc.
KbNew.optPdfWarn: Triples ingestion time and Blob storage cost
KbNew.optPresetDesc: Rerank top-k 10 · Neighbour max aux images 40 · Max images/answer 80 — image-recall 0.574 → ~1.00 (W62–W68 empirical, ADR-0054). For image-dense step-by-step manuals; still adjustable in KB Settings after creation.
KbNew.captioningNote: · auto-fills empty alt_text · no vision pipeline in Beta yet
KbNew.dedupHint: Same image (byte-for-byte) appearing in N documents → uploaded once to Blob, referenced N× from chunk records. Implemented in <mono>ingestion/screenshots/extractor.py</mono>.
KbNew.lowValueHint: Distinct from the chunk-level <mono>low_value_flag</mono> already in the codebase (which marks under-floor text chunks). This image-level filter requires a vision classifier — Tier 2.
KbNew.renderInlineTitle: Render inline images in chat answers
KbNew.renderInlineDesc: Backend <mono>/query</mono> always returns <mono>embedded_images</mono> on citations. This flag is purely a Chat-UI rendering preference — when OFF, screenshots are still extracted + bound + searchable (visible in Document Detail / Image Library), the chat surface just hides them.
KbNew.outcomeTitle: Expected query behaviour with these settings:
KbNew.outcomeBody: A user asks "How do I configure posting definitions for multi-currency journals?" → retrieval returns 5 chunks; 3 carry screenshots from the GL Setup manual; chat answer cites them as <mono>[1][2][3]</mono> {mode}.
KbNew.outcomeModeInline: with screenshots rendered inline beneath the relevant paragraphs
KbNew.defaultsBanner: These are the default per-query parameters. Any chat or retrieval-test call can override them. You can also tune these later from the KB Settings tab — no re-index needed.
KbNew.rerankKLabel: Default rerank_k (final chunks passed to LLM)
KbNew.rerankKHint: After Cohere reranks the top_k, only the top rerank_k chunks become LLM context. Higher = more grounding but more tokens.
KbNew.rerankerHint: Workspace-wide locked per ADR-0012 · per-KB override available in Tier 2

KbUpload.subtitle: Add documents to <mono>ekp-kb-{indexId}-v1</mono>. New chunks are embedded with <mono>{model}</mono> ({dim}d) and upserted to Azure AI Search.
KbUpload.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop a document here
KbUpload.sharepointNote: OAuth via Entra ID · scoped read-only · Wave C+
KbUpload.procHeadingHint: Splits at H1/H2/H3 — for narrative docs
KbUpload.chunkSizeHint: Effective max: 800 — fits within text-embedding-3-large 8k window
KbUpload.processingBanner: Per-batch override not supported — config is KB-locked. To change chunking + multimodal, <link>edit KB Settings</link>.
KbUpload.descScanConfirm: Scanned document needs confirmation — OCR takes longer
KbUpload.scanConfirmTitle: {name} appears to be a scanned document (no text layer)
KbUpload.scanConfirmDesc: Requires OCR; synchronous processing takes ~8–9.5 minutes, and this page keeps waiting throughout. Confirm by clicking "Continue anyway" below.
KbUpload.classificationBody: Automatic document classification (W72 profiler) — detects each document's profile at ingest and applies the matching recall preset.
KbUpload.classificationSub: If misdetected, override with one click on the document detail page · ADR-0056 Layer A
KbUpload.noFileDesc: Go back to Step 1 + pick a document.

Integrations.title: Integrations
Integrations.landingSubtitle: Connect external content sources and import their documents into your knowledge bases.
Integrations.landingBanner: Imported documents run through the same Docling pipeline, profiles and per-KB config as local uploads. Source permissions are mapped to <mono>allowed_principals</mono> (per ADR-0070 / ADR-0066).
Integrations.sharepointCardDesc: Import documents from a SharePoint site granted <mono>Sites.Selected</mono> access.
Integrations.connectAnotherSourceDesc: Google Drive, Box, Confluence and more — planned for a later release.
Integrations.wizardSubtitle1: Connect a site, pick documents, and import them through the EKP ingestion pipeline.
Integrations.wizardSubtitle2: Browse the site you connected, then pick documents to import.
Integrations.wizardSubtitle3: Documents run through the same Docling pipeline as uploads — image recall, profiles, per-KB config unchanged.
Integrations.wizardSubtitle4: Import finished. Review what landed and what needs attention.
Integrations.connectGrantBanner: Before importing, IT must grant this app Sites.Selected (read) on each target site (consent ≠ access). See blueprint §1.3.
Integrations.targetKbHint: Imported documents are added to this KB. A KB can mix uploads + SharePoint.
Integrations.siteUrlHint: The site you granted Sites.Selected access to.
Integrations.credentialBanner: Connection credentials (tenant, app, certificate / secret) are configured server-side by your administrator (H5 — never entered here, never committed). Use Test connection to verify access.
Integrations.selectLibraryEmpty: Select a library or folder to list its documents.
Integrations.importingBanner: Importing {count} documents into {kbId}. A failed document does not stop the batch.

Traces.subtitle: Every <mono>/query</mono> call generates a 9-stage Langfuse trace. Correlated by <mono>trace_id</mono>.
Traces.traceCouldNotLoad: Trace ID <mono>{id}</mono> could not be loaded. Try opening directly in Langfuse:
Traces.costWaveCReason: Wave C+ — per-trace total cost requires Langfuse cost aggregation extension
Traces.queryNotSurfaced: Query text not surfaced — open Langfuse for full input
Traces.noObservationsBucketed: No Langfuse observations bucketed to this stage for this trace.
Traces.citationWaveCReason: Wave C+ — per-trace citation validation status requires aggregator extension
Traces.answerPreviewWaveCReason: Wave C+ — answer preview requires synthesizer.synthesize observation details extension

Eval.subtitle: RAGAs 4-metric evaluation against curated <mono>{setId}</mono> ({size} queries).
Eval.noRunsYet: No eval runs yet — click Run eval suite to start.
Eval.shootoutDesc: W4 4-way → 2-way (per Karpathy §1.2) · W6 D1 LIVE Azure reaffirm · <mono>cohere-v4.0-pro</mono> locked by ADR-0012
Eval.shootoutEmptyHint: Click Reranker shootout in the page header to compare rerankers side-by-side. The endpoint iterates non-skipped reranker labels per `Settings.eval_shootout_rerankers` (W16 F5.4 CO_W15_F1).
Eval.recommendationBody: Keep cohere-v4.0-pro. Swapping to v3.5 produces faithfulness Δ −11.76pp (W6 D1 LIVE Azure reaffirm); swapping to off drops recall 19.6pp from baseline.
Eval.contextRecallWaveCReason: Wave C+ — RAGAs context_recall metric extension
Eval.cragThresholdNote: Confidence Judge threshold 0.70 NON-STICKY per W5 D4. Trigger rate above 30% suggests retrieval tuning needed.
Eval.failedQueriesDesc: Per-query failure inspector populated after eval run
Eval.failedQueriesEmpty: Click Run eval suite above to populate failed queries.
Eval.noFailedQueries: No failed queries — all metrics above strict-acceptance threshold.
Eval.noFailuresMatch: No failures match the selected metric filter.

KbDetail.profileLowConfTitle: Low confidence — please verify the profile manually
KbDetail.failedToIndex: {count, plural, one {# document failed to index} other {# documents failed to index}}
KbDetail.failedBannerDesc: Review parser errors in the Documents tab → “failed” filter.
KbDetail.errorLoadDocuments: Failed to load documents — backend unreachable or Azure AI Search not configured. {msg}
KbDetail.emptyDocsDesc: Word, PDF, or PowerPoint — ingestion pipeline parses + chunks + embeds.
KbDetail.searchDocsPlaceholder: Search documents by title or doc_id…
KbDetail.emptyChunksDesc: Upload a document first — chunks emit during ingestion.
KbDetail.chunkBodyNotListed: Chunk body text not bulk-listed — use Retrieval Testing tab to view full chunk text per query.
KbDetail.statSha256Sub: Same hash → single Blob; {refs} chunk references total
KbDetail.searchImagesPlaceholder: Search by alt text or SHA256…
KbDetail.emptyImagesDesc: Embedded images appear once a doc with figures is ingested.
KbDetail.stratHeadingAwareHint: Splits at H1/H2/H3 — for narrative docs
KbDetail.previewChunkingTitle: Preview chunking on a sample document
KbDetail.chunkingLabExplainer: Strategies are picked by <mono>ingestion/chunker/strategies.py</mono>. Only <mono>layout_aware</mono> and <mono>slide_based</mono> are implemented; <mono>heading_aware</mono> raises <mono>NotImplementedError</mono> (W3+ deferred).
KbDetail.sampleTextDesc: Paste a few paragraphs to preview chunk boundaries
KbDetail.pastePreviewHint: Paste sample text + click Run preview.
KbDetail.pipelineHealthyDesc: All stages running within SLOs · last full re-index {when}
KbDetail.queryDesc: Pure retrieval pass · no LLM synthesis · ADR-0021
KbDetail.noResultsDesc: Tune the query + parameters → click Run retrieval.
KbDetail.tuneParentDesc: Expand matched child chunks to their parent section for fuller LLM context.
KbDetail.tuneCitationExpDesc: After answer generation, add neighbouring auxiliary chunks to each citation to improve completeness.
KbDetail.tuneNeighbourImgDesc: Control how citation-neighbour images are brought in, and the max images shown per answer (image-flood convergence).
KbDetail.tuneInlineMarkersDesc: Answer text carries [IMG#…] markers at the original image positions — the foundation for showing text + images in source order (W71 interleaving); until interleaving is enabled the display layer auto-strips the markers. OFF = current clean text.
KbDetail.configTestDesc: Leaves global and the saved config untouched — try the draft config above against the real pipeline.
KbDetail.noTestRunDesc: Adjust the knobs above → pick the number of runs → click "Test run".
KbDetail.lengthBiasCaveat: Faithfulness has a length bias against long / comprehensive answers — a low score paired with high sections covered / citation count / long answers is usually bias, not a worse config; read it alongside sections covered / citation count / word count, and do not conflate it with completeness.
KbDetail.perCitationTitle: Draft config · sections + images per citation (last run)
KbDetail.configTestFooter: Mean over N reruns · band = max − min (smaller = more stable) · faithfulness quality axis + presentation counters compute band per run · N=1 is directional only
KbDetail.btnSaveDraftConfig: Save draft config to this KB
KbDetail.faithfulnessTooltip: RAGAs faithfulness: whether the answer's claims are supported by the retrieved context (anti-hallucination). Note the length bias against long/comprehensive answers — more claims → higher chance some are not matched sentence-by-sentence to context; a low score does not necessarily mean a worse config, read it against completeness signals (citation count / word count), and do not conflate it with completeness.
KbDetail.singleJudgeRun: Single judge run · directional · raise reruns to ≥2 to see the stability band
KbDetail.generalKbIdHint: Locked. Forms index ekp-kb-{kbId}-v1 · cannot be changed without recreating the KB.
KbDetail.embeddingModelHint: Locked. {dim}d MRL truncate · changing requires full re-index.
KbDetail.chunkStrategyHint: Re-index required. Changing the chunk strategy affects chunk boundaries — after saving, all documents must be re-indexed to take effect.
KbDetail.maxImagesHint: Re-index required. Leave blank = use the global cap (8). Max images per chunk; exceeding it triggers a force-split (ADR-0042).
KbDetail.topKHint2: Editable any time · doesn’t require re-index
KbDetail.answerDetailHint: Takes effect immediately · no re-index. concise = summary (default, ≤150 chars); detailed = walks through each sub-step (suited to procedural manuals; longer answers / higher cost).
KbDetail.advancedTuningDesc: Per-KB overrides for retrieval / citation / image behaviour. Un-overridden knobs use the global defaults. All runtime — no re-index needed (unlike the locked embedding / chunk strategy above).
KbDetail.presetDesc: Rerank top-k = 10 (General section above) · Neighbour max aux images = 40 · Max images / answer = 80 — image-recall 0.574 → ~1.00 (ADR-0054). Applying only fills the draft; once the test run looks good, click "Save to this KB" to take effect.
KbDetail.configScopeKb: Config scope: per-query > per-KB (this page) > global · ADR-0040
KbDetail.reindexDesc: Re-parse every document from its stored original source under the current config. Needed after a chunk_strategy or image-cap change.
KbDetail.explainerStep1: Each document is re-fetched from its stored original source (Word / PDF / PPT).
KbDetail.explainerStep2: Its existing chunks are removed, then it’s re-parsed via the current chunker config (chunk_strategy + max images / chunk).
KbDetail.explainerStep3: Each chunk is re-embedded and upserted into <mono>ekp-kb-{kbId}-v1</mono>.
KbDetail.explainerStep4: Repeats per document — synchronous, in-place (Tier 1: no task queue).
KbDetail.explainerWhenList: chunk_strategy change · max-images-per-chunk change · Docling parser upgrade.
KbDetail.explainerNote: Docs ingested before W46 (no stored source) are skipped + reported — re-upload them to make them reindexable. Zero-downtime v1→v2 atomic switch + eval gate stays a Track A enhancement.
KbDetail.modalReindexDesc: Re-parses every document from its stored original source under the current config. Each document is briefly unavailable while it rebuilds.
KbDetail.modalSaveFirstDesc: Re-index uses the saved config. Unsaved chunk_strategy / image-cap edits won’t apply until saved.
KbDetail.toastKbDeleted: KB deleted — record + Azure index dropped
KbDetail.toastDeletePartial: Record removed, but the Azure index drop failed — it may linger. Clear it manually via scripts/create_index.py delete.
KbDetail.modalDeleteDesc: Permanently removes the KB record and drops its Azure AI Search index <mono> ekp-kb-{kbId}-v1</mono>. Irreversible — re-create + re-index to restore.
KbDetail.modalDeleteNote: Screenshot blobs are retained (cleared separately). The Azure index slot is freed immediately.

DocDetail.imgStripDesc: Each chunk references images via <mono>embedded_image_positions</mono>; orchestrator resolves to <mono>ImageRef.blob_url</mono>.
DocDetail.selectChunkPrompt: Select a chunk to inspect metadata + embedding preview.
DocDetail.chunkTextNotSurfaced: Body text not surfaced via list_chunks (chunk_text_preview only via retrieval-test or /query). Use Retrieval Testing tab for full chunk text.

DocConfig.toastProfileApplied: Applied profile + matching preset (reload the page to see updated knobs)
DocConfig.scopeBannerText: Per-document custom configuration — Leave blank = Inherit from KB ({kbName}) then global.
DocConfig.resolutionPriority: Resolution priority: per-query > per-DOC (this document) > per-KB > global · ADR-0050 · PUT /kb/{kbId}/docs/{docId}/config
DocConfig.cardProfileDesc: The system detects the content type from the document's structure signals and auto-applies the matching recall preset. Wrong detection → override with one click below.
DocConfig.lowConfDetection: Low-confidence detection (conflicting structure signals) — fell back to a conservative preset. Recommend manually confirming the profile below.
DocConfig.overrideHint: Changing the profile immediately applies the matching preset to the knobs below (overrides the per-doc config). Admin override always takes priority over auto-detection (ADR-0056 D6).
DocConfig.cardPerDocDesc: Override this document's synthesis + citation post-processing behavior. Knobs not overridden use the KB defaults. All runtime — no re-indexing needed.
DocConfig.answerDetailHint: Synthesis detail level. Procedure-manual documents can be set to <mono>detailed</mono> (lists every step); Inherit = use the KB setting.
DocConfig.groupCitationExpDesc: After the answer is generated, supplement each citation with neighbouring auxiliary chunks to improve completeness.
DocConfig.groupNeighbourImgDesc: Controls bringing in citation-neighbour images and the max images shown per answer (image-flood convergence).
DocConfig.knobOverviewPin: Chapter overview image on top (overview pin)
DocConfig.groupInlineAnchorTitle: Inline image anchoring (image markers + section anchoring)
DocConfig.groupInlineAnchorDesc: Answer text carries [IMG#…] markers at the original image positions, so text and images interleave in the source order. Advanced: section anchoring injects trailing un-anchored images into the same section, and can cap images per anchor (converges intra-section clumps).
DocConfig.knobSectionAnchored: section-anchored aux images (trailing pile → into section)
DocConfig.knobAnchorNearest: Anchor to nearest step (nearest; else section end)
DocConfig.knobMaxPerAnchor: Max images per anchor (0 = no cap)
DocConfig.configScopeDoc: Config scope: per-query > per-DOC (this document) > per-KB > global · ADR-0050
DocConfig.retrievalEntryExplainer: Retrieval-entry knobs (default_top_k / default_rerank_k / parent-document retrieval) are set at the KB level and can't be overridden per-document —— these knobs drive retrieval before it's determined which document gets cited (ADR-0050).
DocConfig.testRunDesc: Test run with this document's config on the real pipeline (dominant doc = this document).
DocConfig.noTestRunDesc: Adjust the knobs above → pick the number of runs → click "Test run".
DocConfig.lengthBiasCaveat: For long / comprehensive answers, faithfulness has a length bias —— a low score paired with high Sections covered / word count is usually bias, not a config difference; read them together.
DocConfig.footerAvgRuns: Average over N runs · band = max − min · answer_detail included in the test-run draft
DocConfig.singleJudgeRun: Single judge run · directional · raise runs to ≥2 to see the stability band

KbAccess.visPrivateDesc: Only explicit members + Workspace Admins · others can't see this KB
KbAccess.visWorkspaceDesc: Any member of Ricoh · RAPO can find + query this KB
KbAccess.visPublicDesc: Listed in public KB catalog · queryable via anonymous API key
KbAccess.errorDesc: Managing a KB's access list requires the <mono>manage</mono> role on this KB.
KbAccess.bannerDesc: Members listed here can query / edit / manage this KB regardless of their workspace role. Workspace Admins always have full access.
KbAccess.visibilityCardDesc: Who can see this KB exists at all
KbAccess.membersCardDesc: Per-KB role overrides workspace role · “Manager” can edit access list itself

DeploymentsTable.emptyDefault: No deployments configured for this provider.
